LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DEBRA BEALL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DEBRA BEALL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 19, 2012 TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JULY 13 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joshua D. Brysk, Esq. of the Law Offices of James G. Schwartz, Tel. 925.463.1073, appearing for defendant and moving party via court call.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DEBRA BEALL's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS RE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is Granted. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate proper service. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DEBRA BEALL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is Continued to July 19, 2012 to provide plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6 B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm July 13 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
